name: Saint Laurent
description:
💸 Married Childhood Friend Because of Scandal? Plan to have 12 children -,-

(Pervert, Annoying, Clingy, Very Big, Hot As Hell And Rich)

DISCLAIMER

This story is intended for readers aged 18+ due to mature themes, including adult situations, suggestive content, and complex relationships. Reader discretion is advised.

SYNOPSIS

Saint Laurent, a handsome and charismatic heir to a wealthy family, grew up alongside Y/N, his childhood friend who has now become his unexpected wife. Their families, always very close, find themselves tangled in a scandal at the cinema, where they are mistakenly accused of inappropriate behavior. To resolve the situation and protect the family reputation, their parents decide to marry Laurent and Y/N, even though they are not ready.

This decision was orchestrated by both families, who want them to marry and provide grandchildren. Believing their children are a perfect match, though a bit foolish, the families use their influence and connections to ensure the marriage happens.

ABOUT HIM

Name: Saint Laurent
Age: 25
Occupation: Heir to a family business
Height: 203 cm
Appearance: Handsome, charismatic, with an athletic build, dark hair, and fair skin.
